summary: P0 Router Extraction Testing Complete - All 18 backend tests passed, frontend admin dashboard loads correctly. Analytics, Notifications, and Cards routers successfully extracted with 100% behavior parity.

features_tested.analytics_overview: PASS - GET /api/v1/admin/analytics/overview returns complete stats object
features_tested.analytics_monthly: PASS - GET /api/v1/admin/analytics/monthly returns 6 months of data
features_tested.notification_counts: PASS - GET /api/v1/admin/notification-counts returns counts for all 5 sections
features_tested.data_types_analytics: PASS - All fields correct types (int, float)
features_tested.response_shape_cards: PASS - Pagination and data structure correct

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - ecommbx login page loads correctly
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard shows Overview with charts and stats
frontend_tests.analytics_charts: PASS - User Growth and Monthly Transactions charts render with data
frontend_tests.stats_cards: PASS - Total Users (91), Active Users (73), Pending KYC (1), Transactions (131), Volume (€36.5M)
frontend_tests.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All menu items visible: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings
frontend_tests.notification_badges: PASS - Support Tickets shows badge (2), top-right shows 99+ badge

critical_code_review_comments: Router extraction maintains 100% behavior parity - all response structures identical
Analytics router uses performance-optimized parallel queries with asyncio.gather()
Notifications router correctly handles per-admin section views with upsert
Cards router includes full pagination, search, and user info enrichment
All routers properly import dependencies from dependencies.py
Both user and admin routers exported from cards.py and notifications.py
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test account as specified
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 router extraction complete. Three routers extracted: analytics.py (admin analytics), notifications.py (user + admin notifications), cards.py (user + admin cards). All endpoints maintain identical response structures. Ready for next extraction phase (accounts, recipients, transfers). Test file created: test_router_extraction_p0.py covers all 10 endpoints specified in review request.
rca_of_issue: No issues found - all extracted routers maintain 100% behavior parity with original server.py implementation.
